meaning: n.马赛(法国东南部港市),马赛布
examples: The passengers can travel from Paris to Marseilles in only four hours.
Why, sometimes I dream of the shell-fish of Marseilles, and wake up crying!
Salah Bariki, a community organiser in Marseilles, describes what happens in his local barber's shop.
When the boat arrived in Marseilles, Taleb was standing at the dock waiting for them.
